text_original:
On the willows at the east gate,
The leaves are very luxuriant.
The evening was the time agreed on,
And the morning star is shining bright.
text_normalized:
On the willows at the east gate,
The leaves are very luxuriant.
The evening was the time agreed on,
And the morning star is shining bright.

text_original:
On the willows at the east gate,
The leaves are dense.
The evening was the time agreed on,
And the morning star is shining bright.
text_normalized:
On the willows at the east gate,
The leaves are dense.
The evening was the time agreed on,
And the morning star is shining bright.
